channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Top Starmer ally insists he is not plotting leadership bid
item.description: Top Starmer ally insists he is not plotting leadership bid

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): No 10 braced for ‘excruciating’ revelations as messages between Mandelson and ministers to be released – UK politics live
item.description: No 10 braced for ‘excruciating’ revelations as messages between Mandelson and ministers to be released – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson files latest: Batch of secret WhatsApp messages to be released today as Starmer braced for embarrassment
item.description: Mandelson files latest: Batch of secret WhatsApp messages to be released today as Starmer braced for embarrassment

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer has nowhere left to hide as scope of Mandelson documents threatens to engulf Labour
item.description: Starmer has nowhere left to hide as scope of Mandelson documents threatens to engulf Labour

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer Braces for Release of Hundreds of Mandelson Messages - Bloomberg.com

item.title: BBC Politics: Second batch of Mandelson files to be published on Monday
item.description: Second batch of Mandelson files to be published on Monday

item.title: BBC Politics: Ministers braced as Mandelson document release will expose government working

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer braced for release of Mandelson files on Monday
